components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Detonite Injector
components.description:
Detonite injectors are the basis for explosive and incendiary weapons.

Location: Clan Research (Chem Lab in the Dojo) and Grineer Invasion Rewards

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed several parts of the Ogris sliding around when selecting colors while customizing.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes:
Kuva Ogris
Ogris
Kuva Ogris: From 30 to 7
Fixed some stacking explosion FX issues with the Ogris Nightwatch Napalm mod, and made it respect Reduce Team FX settings. 
Optimized the particle FX on the Ogris.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.changes: Made it impossible for enemies to be able to detonate/shoot down player explosive projectiles (Ogris for example).

patchlogs.name: Update 31.1.0: Echoes of War
patchlogs.changes: Adjusted the Ogris and Kuva Ogris Nightwatch Napalm FX to be cleaner and use energy color consistently.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.9.0: Prime Resurgence
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed changing the emissives on the Ogris Rocket Launcher Skin not applying changes.

patchlogs.name: Nights of Naberus: Update 30.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some overlapping textures on the Ogris Unreal Rocket Launcher Skin.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: TennoGen: Hotfix 30.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nightwatch Napalm not counting kills caused by the lingering fireball as Ogris kills for the purposes of awarding Affinity.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.7
patchlogs.changes:
Increased the base damage (before elemental bonus) of the Kuva Ogris from 454 to 714.
Fixed Kuva Lich weapons that do damage on both impact and explosion (Kuva Ogris, Kuva Ayanga, etc) doing significantly less overall damage than expected. This was due to the Elemental bonus only being applied to the "on impact" of the projectile itself and not the explosion.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.6 + 26.0.6.1
patchlogs.changes: Fixed the Kuva Ogris not creating a fireball or any fire FX on impact if the Nightwatch Napalm Mod is equipped.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Hotfix 24.6.2 + 24.6.2.1
patchlogs.changes: Reverted the Ogris Changes made in 24.6.0:

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Ogris’ Nightwatch Napalm Mod only doing damage in the 4.5% explosion area (top of the projectile) instead of the intended 90% explosion area (at max rank).

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.changes: Updated the Ogris and Grineer Napalm’s fire FX.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Castanas, Talons and Ogris projectiles being destroyed in flight doing 4x damage with 2x radius in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes: The Ogris has gone through a visual Upgrade, and now it's time for a stat upgrade. To many, this was their first entry into Launcher weapons

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.10.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed unintentional DOT from Adhesive Blast on the Ogris, Penta, Secura Penta, and Tonkor.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 19.0.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Adhesive Blast causing the Zarr, Penta, Tonkor, Torid, Secura Penta, and Ogris’ projectile sound to not play.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes: Increased ammo pool of Ogris in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed enemies and allies floating upwards when hit by an Ogris with Adhesive Blast.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove
patchlogs.changes: Ogris damage and projectile speed increased in Conclave

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.10.5
patchlogs.changes: •    Improved the FX of the Ogris Napalm Nightwatch mod.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.10.4 Operation Rathuum.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed other players getting damaged by projectiles (i.e Ogris)  after Mirage’s Hall of Mirrors expires.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.7.0
patchlogs.changes: •    The Ogris can now be used in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes: Updated Ogris visual impact and muzzle flash FX.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.10 & Tactial Alert: Divine Will
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an extended delay that occurs with the Ogris when attempting to fire the weapon after cancelling a charged shot.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.10.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue enabling players to mantle recently fired Ogris rockets.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a bug where the Adhesive Blast mod would cause Ogris missiles to pass through enemies, doors, loot-crates etc.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.1.0 - 17.1.4
patchlogs.changes: This bundle of Nightwatch Skins suits the Ack & Brunt, Ogris and Nukor. They have been modeled after the camouflage employed by the Nightwatch Corps, an elite squadron in the Grineer Military.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Ogris’ rockets not exploding properly when used with the Adhesive blast Mod.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes: Adjusted the range and impact of explosions caused by the Ogris’ rockets.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed fire rate Mods not allowing charge weapons like the Ogris or Opticor to fire.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: ·         Fixed Ogris charging effects and firing animation not displaying properly.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.16.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing explosion effect from Ogris.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.9.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixes reported cases of clients not being able to damage enemies caught in Vortex when using the Ogris, Torid, etc.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.2.0: Avalanche Offensive
patchlogs.fixes: Update 14.2.0: Avalanche Offensive Psa: The Launcher May Require You To Enter Your Windows Administrator Password To Update Your Firewall Rules.Avalanche Offensive Is On Until Monday @ 12 Noon Edt! Avalanche Offensivedefeat The Corpus Arctic Eximus!A Message From Cantis Of The Red Veil Resistance:Here'S What You'Ll Need To Dogo Forth And Take Down The Corpus Arctic Eximus, Tenno!Additions:Weapon Balance Changes:     • Grakata    • Castanas    • Ogris    • Torid    • Penta    • Lanka    • Vectis    • Vulkar    • Angstrum:    • Acrid:    • Attica:    • Spectra & Flux Rifle:    • Snipetron (+Vandal):    • Torid Changes:    • All Launchers:Key Hosting Improvements:Changes:Fixes:

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.5
patchlogs.changes: Performance Improvements for Mirage + Hall of Mirrors and Angstrum, Ogris, Penta, and Mutalist Quanta, and Stug.

patchlogs.name: Update 14: The Mad Cephalon
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Multishot Mods causing Ogris rockets to fly through enemies and walls dealing no damage.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.5.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed radial damage being broken for clients (Nova's Molecular Prime, Ogris, etc).

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.8.4
patchlogs.fixes: Toned down Ogris charge effect

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ogris charge sound effect playing randomly when it wasn't being charged.

patchlogs.name: Update 9.5: Operation Arid Fear
patchlogs.changes: Added custom reload animations for Dera, Supra, Lanka, Ogris, Lex, and Kraken.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.3
patchlogs.fixes: Lanka, Ogris updated charged sounds.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.0.7
patchlogs.changes: Fix for Ogris and Multishot damaging player.
